value: No C2 domain or IP is published: exfiltration is manual - the operator retrieves the local log file holding the OAuth authorization code and exchanges it for an access token off-host to reach Gmail via the Google API.
Activity window is 2025 (Kaspersky Sigma rules dated 2025-08-11 and 2025-12-11); what is fresh is the consolidated Part 2 publication on 2026-06-30.
